reviews.review_title: 🎃 A Fast, Fun, and Festive VR Treat!
reviews.review_description:
Spooky Dreams! is a charming and energetic arcade experience that perfectly captures the Halloween spirit. Each level represents an hour on the clock and lasts just 60 seconds — a fun, frantic race to grab gems, dodge skulls, and survive the chaos (watch out for those pumpkins — they’re ruthless!).

The lane-based movement keeps you physically engaged, making great use of VR immersion. Between the colorful visuals, catchy music, and clever humor (the “axe-cuse me” moment is a gem), it’s impossible not to smile while playing.

A simple yet addictive concept, Spooky Dreams! is ideal for quick bursts of spooky fun — and an excellent way to get into the Halloween mood.

reviews.review_title: Great thematic break away from reality!
reviews.review_description: Spooky Dreams! - Halloween is a fun, light-hearted VR game that gets you moving while dodging ghosts, grabbing candy and soaking in all the Halloween vibes. It’s spooky without being scary, with smooth tracking and great music that keeps the energy up. A surprisingly good workout disguised as a haunted adventure perfect for quick sessions or showing off at a Halloween party!
I had a great time playing this game. It's ideal for adults and also for teenagers, for a party or even just to have fun and stay fit. I liked a lot the narrating voice too

reviews.review_title: Glad it's not a 3rd person perspective
reviews.review_description:
I almost didn't buy this because I saw the trailer and I thought it was controlling a character from a 3rd person perspective. Thankfully it's a 1st person view so you experience all the action directly.

That said, I like this game and how it gets you moving and dodging! Looking forward to how it evolves:)

developer_response.body: Hi Jake, thanks for the review. We're really glad you enjoyed it. Good point about the trailer, we'll look into that.

reviews.review_description:
Spooky Dreams VR isn’t just another haunted house experience — it’s a full-body workout cleverly wrapped in a nightmarish dreamscape. From the moment you step into its eerie, shifting environments, the game keeps you moving, ducking, dodging, and reaching as you fend off ghostly figures and navigate surreal, dreamlike challenges.

What makes Spooky Dreams VR stand out is how seamlessly it blends fear and fitness. Every jump scare pushes your heart rate up, every escape sequence gets your legs pumping, and every interactive puzzle keeps your arms in motion. It’s cardio with a purpose — and somehow, you’re too immersed to realize how much you’re actually sweating.

the constant motion turns this spooky adventure into an unexpected fitness session. For players looking to get active without stepping into a gym, Spooky Dreams VR transforms working out into an electrifying, pulse-racing experience that’ll leave you breathless — both from the scares and the effort.

Verdict: A perfect mix of fright and fitness — Spooky Dreams VR proves that burning calories has never been this thrilling. 👻💪I
Claiming first review 👑! An absolute blast! Fun cardio in disguise, and that axe level is 🔥! Almost 5 stars ... I’ll update as it evolves! Suggestion: make the stuff in the main room interactable!

developer_response.body: Dear Mia, thanks for the awesome review! We love hearing you're having a blast. A new update is coming soon. Great suggestion about the interactable lobby - it's definitely something we'll consider for a future update. Stay tuned!
